title: Jonathan the Tortoise Just Extended His Record to 194 Years
script: How old is Jonathan? The Seychelles giant tortoise on Saint Helena island was named a Guinness World Records Icon this week — at 194 years old. Born around 1832. Abraham Lincoln was 23 when Jonathan was a hatchling. When the Titanic sank, Jonathan was 80. He has outlasted 8 British monarchs, 2 world wars, the moon landing, and 5 generations of the same island's keepers. Researchers are studying his cells — he barely ages at a cellular level, which scientists say could hold clues for human longevity. His keeper says Jonathan spends his days grazing and basking in the sun, same as always. 194 years on 1 island. No complaints. So: what does Jonathan know about staying alive that the rest of us don't?
